nasb.text: “A little while, and you will no longer see Me; and again a little while, and you will see Me.”

esv.text: “A little while, and you will see me no longer; and     again a little while, and you will see me.”

cnv.text: “不久，你們不會再看見我；再過不久，你們還要看見我。”

ccb.text: “不久，你们就见不到我了，再过不久，你们还会看见我。”

csbs.text: “过一会儿，你们就不再看到我了；再过一会儿，你们又将见到我    。”
